activity.content: Weber, we've drafted a professional email to Bruce at bdarchitect.net requesting a meeting next week to discuss the project timeline. The email offers flexible scheduling between Tuesday and Thursday with options for in-person, virtual, or whatever format works best for him. We've set up automatic follow-up tracking to remind us in two business days if Bruce doesn't respond. The draft is ready for your review and approval - once you give the go-ahead, we'll send it immediately. Would you like to
